info.title: DND Campaign Vault Server API
info.description:
Comprehensive OpenAPI documentation generated from `server/api` route files and endpoint inventory.

Notes:
- All endpoints listed in `dev_plan/endpoint_cleanup/ServerApiEndpoints.md` are included.
- Request/response envelopes follow `{ data, error }`.
- Endpoint-specific payload models are fully defined for merged/action-heavy endpoints; other mutation endpoints use a generic request schema and examples.
- Operations are cookie-authenticated unless explicitly public.
